modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Verify access for users to the listservs.

full_description_text:  
User request to check if these people have access to listservs. There is some confusion about who is included. Please confirm their access status.
short_description: Verify access for users to the listservs.
description: User request to check if these people have access to listservs. There is some confusion about who is included. Please confirm their access status.
